name: unit-toggle
title: Unit Toggle
description: Switches the unit a value is displayed in (mg/dL ↔ mmol/L, kg ↔ lb, °C ↔ °F). Emits the unit; the caller owns the conversion.

props.name: units
props.description: `{ value, label?, description? }`. `description` is the spoken name — "milligrams per decilitre".

props.name: value / defaultValue / onValueChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled. Emits the selected unit only.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible name. Say which measurement it switches, not just "units".

clinicalNotes: Unit ambiguity is a documented source of clinical harm — a glucose read as mg/dL when it was mmol/L is off by a factor of eighteen. Two consequences are built in. The component performs no conversion: it emits the selected unit and the caller converts, so rounding and precision stay under test in code the consumer owns rather than being decided by a UI library. And deselection is ignored (Radix emits an empty value when the active item is pressed again), because a clinical value must never be displayed without a unit. Always render the active unit beside the number, never only on the toggle.
notes: Pairs with any chart or value display in the Clinical Data round. Composes toggle-group.
